_comment: Species: Wind Wolf (风狼) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Wind Wolf

canonical.appearance: Wolf 2 m tall, fur silver-grey, moves faster than eye can track, breath carries cutting wind
canonical.size: 2 m adult, 150 jin; ancient 4 m, 2000 jin
canonical.behavior: Pack hunter; surrounds prey then strikes as one; cultivates by running through storms
canonical.habitat: Plains, wind-aspected spirit veins, mountain foothills
canonical.diet: plains beasts, spirit-herb grazers, lost travelers
canonical.relationships: Pack hunters; preyed upon by thunder beasts
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: wind_wolf — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
